calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Prove-Up Hearing Date And Default Court Judgment On Defendants Water 2 Table, Inc. Dba Ancora And Fdba Water 2 Table And Fdba Seven Fishes, And Andi Conte, And Seven Fishes, Llc Dba Ancora And Fdba Seven Fishes.
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20 am and concluding at 10:01 am.

Plaintiff Cooks Company Produce Inc. is present represented by Kaipolani K Young, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Water 2 Table DBA Ancora and FDBA Seven Fishes is not present.
Defendant Andi Conte is not present.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

ELAINE TOMBARI is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits from the Amended Declaration of Elaine Tombari for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Credit Application.........................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit B: California Secretary of State Business Search (Water 2 Table)..............ID/EVID
Exhibit C: Email......................................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit D: Email......................................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit E: California Secretary of State Business Search (Seven Fishes)...............ID/EVID
Exhibit F: California Department of Alcoholic Beverage Control License Information....ID/EVID
Exhibit G: FBN Statement..............................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit H: Invoices...................................................................ID/EVID

COURT FINDS:
1. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on May-17-2024
2. Default against Defendants Water 2 Table DBA Ancora and FDBA Seven Fishes and Andi Conte entered on May-17-2024.
3. The Operative pleading is the complaint filed on Mar-7-2024.
4. The Complaint was served upon the Defendant Seven Fishes, LLC dba Ancora and fdba Seven Fishes by substitute service on Mar-11-2024
5. The Complaint was served upon the Defendant Water 2 Table, Inc. dba Ancora and fdba Water 2 Table and fdba Seven Fishes by substitute service on Mar-11-2024.
6. The Defendant did owe a contractual obligation to the Plantiff and Defendant has breached that obligation.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Cooks Company Produce Inc., and against Defendants Water 2 Table DBA Ancora and FDBA Seven Fishes and Andi Conte, as follows:

1. Damages: $35,368.46
2. Prejudgment Interest: $8,214.24
3. Costs: $675.00
4. Attorney fees: $ 3,500.00
3
TOTAL JUDGMENT: $47,757.70

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
